content:
If the account is an IMAP account, messages are synchronized with the Microsoft server, so deleting them in one place deletes them everywhere. This is not the case with POP accounts. If you do not know what kind of account you have, go to account settings, click on "server settings", and see what server type is identified at the top of the right pane.

For each folder of messages that you want to save, right click on the folder name in the folder pane, then select "Copy to ..." and copy the folder to local folders.

For special folders (inbox, drafts, sent, trash, etc.), you will have to create a corresponding folder in local folders, then select all the messages in a folder, right click, and copy those messages to the corresponding folder that you created in local folders.
creator: mozilla98
